name: Robin iProMotion HDP
comment:
iProMotion HDP (with HDMI)
Elevate your bar, club, stage, or retail promotions to new heights with the cutting‑edge Robe iProMotion™ IP65‑rated moving head effects and video projector.
The sleek and compact iProMotion™ projector delivers a vibrant output of 1.000 ANSI Lumens using its enduring 20.000 hour LED source. With advanced RGB and CMY colour mixing capabilities, colour temperature control, digital gobos, graphic effects, and video projection, the possibilities are limitless - rain or shine!

iProMotion HDP (with HDMI)
Elevate your bar, club, stage, or retail promotions to new heights with the cutting‑edge Robe iProMotion™ IP65‑rated moving head effects and video projector.

With advanced RGB and CMY colour mixing capabilities, colour temperature control, digital gobos, graphic effects, and video projection, the possibilities are limitless - rain or shine!
